description_long: This is a simple, two-segment snowman constructed from compacted snow, with a rounded base and a smaller, slightly lopsided head stacked on top. The surface is uneven and textured, with visible indentations and some subtle grayish discoloration, suggesting natural melting or dirt accumulation. The front of the snowman features three distinct facial features: two round eye holes and a large, open mouth, all appearing to be carved or pressed into the snow. Three button-like indentations are visible on the torso, mimicking the look of traditional snowman buttons. There are no visible arms, accessories, or headwear, giving the snowman a minimalistic and somewhat unfinished appearance. The overall form is squat and slightly asymmetrical, typical of a quickly built snowman found in urban parks or residential yards.
description: A two-segment, lopsided snowman with carved facial features and button-like indentations, lacking arms or accessories. Its surface is rough, uneven, and slightly discolored.
description_view_0: The back of the snowman, showing a rounded, uneven surface with no facial features or buttons visible.
description_view_1: A side view revealing the snowman's profile, with the head and body contours visible but only a hint of facial features and buttons.
description_view_2: The front view, displaying the snowman's carved eyes, open mouth, and three button-like indentations on the torso.
description_view_3: An angled front view, highlighting the facial features and buttons, as well as the snowman's asymmetrical shape.
